sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 366 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.2082/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Counsel, under instructions, does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
